title: DACA recipients are losing protections and work permits as renewal delays surge - Green & Spiegel
content:
## DACA recipients are losing protections and work permits as renewal delays surge
A CNN report highlights growing delays in renewals for individuals protected under Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA), creating disruptions for recipients, employers, and critical workforce sectors nationwide. Dan Berger, founder of a DACA clinic at Cornell Law School, noted that renewed fingerprinting requirements and enhanced vetting measures could contribute to longer processing times.
